Verdant Pay — generated Expo project

This Expo Router project targets Expo SDK 57 and React Native 0.86. The graph enables a custom development client. Install it with pnpm ios, pnpm android, or the EAS development profile, then run pnpm start. Use the EAS preview profile for internal distribution.

IntentForm owns the paths listed in intentform.expo.json. Files under src/project-components are project-owned integration points and are never generated.
